schoolYear.allFieldsRequired: All fields are required: name, startMonth, startYear, endMonth, endYear

schoolYear.branchAgeGroupRequired: branch and ageGroup query params are required

email.accountActivation.subject: Account activation link
email.accountActivation.heading: Activate your account

email.newRegistrationAdmin.subject: New child registration: {childName}
email.newRegistrationAdmin.heading: New child registration
email.newRegistrationAdmin.intro: A new registration has been submitted for {childName} ({schoolYearName}).
email.registrationApproval.subject: Registration approved for {childName}
email.registrationApproval.heading: Registration approved
email.registrationApproval.intro: We are happy to inform you that the registration of {childName} for {schoolYearName} has been approved.
email.registrationApproval.contractRemin: If you have not uploaded the signed contract yet, you can do so from your registrations page.
email.registrationRejection.subject: Registration update for {childName}
email.registrationRejection.heading: Registration update
email.registrationRejection.intro: We regret to inform you that the registration of {childName} for {schoolYearName} has been rejected.
email.registrationRejection.contact: If you believe this was a mistake, please contact the administration.
